data.title: Market Sentiment Shifts as Fear and Greed Index Rises
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Alternative.me indicates that the Fear and Greed Index has increased to 39 today, up from 18 yesterday, which was categorized as a state of 'extreme fear.' This change suggests a shift in market sentiment from 'extreme fear' to 'fear.'

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 1,600 USDT with a Narrowed 8.08% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 10, 2025, 07:31 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 1,600 USDT and is now trading at 1,597.630005 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 8.08% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: BitMart will soon list QuarkChain(QKC)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch QuarkChain (QKC) at 16:00 (ET) on April 10, and will open QKC/USDT trading pairs.
Quarkchain is a blockchain underlying technology solution based on sharding technology, with the characteristics of security, decentralization, high throughput and scalability, and will achieve a transaction processing capacity of more than 100,000 links per second (100,000+ TPS).

data.description:
Ripple has minted its latest batch of RLUSD tokens on the XRP Ledger
source: https://u.today/350000-rlusd-minted-on-xrp-ledger

data.title: Backpack CEO: Take FTX as an example and prioritize building a transparent and robust risk control system to ensure the safety of user funds
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Backpack CEO Armani mentioned FTX and Alameda Research, saying that Backpack will take the collapse of FTX as a lesson, give priority to building a robust and transparent risk management system to ensure the safety of user funds. Backpack does not operate its own market makers, has no motivation to liquidate users, and gives priority to fair liquidation on the order book (99.82% of liquidations are completed directly on the order book), allowing any market participant to participate in transactions fairly.
In addition, Armani also explained Backpack's three-step liquidation process (order book liquidation, backup liquidity support, automatic deleveraging), and reduced market shocks through measures such as gradual liquidation and price impact bands to protect users from unreasonable liquidations.

data.title: Bithumb launches BABY
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On April 10, according to official news, South Korean cryptocurrency trading platform Bithumb has launched BABY.

data.title: Gate.io HODLer Airdrop Launches Freedogs(FREEDOG)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch FREEDOG spot trading at 20:00 on April 15 (UTC+8), and will start the HODLer Airdrop from 16:00 on April 13 to 16:00 on April 15 (UTC+8). Holders of 1 GT can receive the airdrop for free and share 10,000,000 FREEDOG tokens. The upper limit for individual participation is 5,000 GT.

data.title: OKX launches exclusive WalletConnect airdrop event, participants can share 6,500,000 WCT tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, to celebrate the official launch of WalletConnect on OKX, an exclusive airdrop event jointly initiated by WalletConnect and OKX has been launched, and a total of 6,500,000 WCT tokens will be issued.
Users can participate in this airdrop event in the following ways: visit the event page, connect to the OKX Web3 wallet, deposit WCT tokens in the wallet, and fill in the OKX UID and OKX Optimism recharge wallet address to obtain airdrop qualifications.
WalletConnect is an open source protocol that aims to connect users to decentralized applications (dApps) in a secure and interoperable way, promote user experience innovation, expand the ecosystem, and guide the network towards a decentralized, permissionless future.

data.title: Revolut fined €3.5M in Lithuania for AML failures amid $45B IPO ambitions
data.description:
10-4-2025 – Revolut, a financial institution celebrated for its embrace of cryptocurrencies, has been slapped with a hefty €3. 5 million fine in Lithuania, as reported by PANews. The penalty, the steepest allowed under local regulations, stems from shortcomings in the bank’s efforts to combat money laundering. Lithuanian authorities pointed to a series of “violations and [

data.title: BitMart will list Babylon(BABY)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch Babylon (BABY) at 18:00 (Eastern Time) on April 10, and the BABY/USDT trading pair will be launched.
The Babylon Bitcoin Staking Protocol connects the Bitcoin Security Network with Bitcoin holders, giving you direct access to the largest and most powerful community in the cryptocurrency space.
